scripts.migrate:safe: if [ -z "$SUPABASE_DB_URL" ]; then echo "SUPABASE_DB_URL is missing"; exit 1; fi; case "$SUPABASE_DB_URL" in postgres://*|postgresql://*) ;; *) echo "SUPABASE_DB_URL must start with postgres:// or postgresql://"; exit 1;; esac; case "$SUPABASE_DB_URL" in *"[YOUR-PASSWORD]"*|*"<password>"*|*"xxxxxx"*|*"YOUR_PASSWORD"*) echo "SUPABASE_DB_URL still contains a placeholder password"; exit 1;; esac; npx supabase@latest db push --db-url "$SUPABASE_DB_URL"
